hero.title: Prashant Mobile Solutions
hero.subtitle: Expert Mobile Repairs And Industry Focused Training
hero.description: We provide reliable mobile repair services along with professional training programs to help students build successful careers in the mobile repairing industry. Trusted service, experienced technicians, and practical learning, all under one roof.

footer.location: C15/9, Gali No. 1, Near Bus Stand, Bhajanpura, Delhi 110053
footer.about_paragraph: We believe every student has the potential to build a successful career. Through practical training, expert guidance, and industry-focused learning, we prepare future mobile technicians with the skills and confidence to succeed.

galleryPage.heading: Our Gallery
galleryPage.description: A glimpse into the care, precision, and craftsmanship that shape every repair, service, and customer experience we deliver.

courses_page.heading: Our Courses
courses_page.description: We offer hands-on training from basic hardware repair to advanced chip-level techniques. Choose from structured tracks for Android and iPhone repair, with practical labs, soldering practice and troubleshooting.
list: Basic Android Repair — components, disassembly, common faults
Advanced Android Repair — eMMC/CPU programming, diagnostics
Complete iPhone Repair — Face ID, board-level repairs, microsoldering

basic.title: Android Mobile Repair - Basic
basic.description: Learn Android device basics, hardware components, disassembly, soldering basics and common fault repairs from scratch.

advanced_android.title: Advanced Android Repair
advanced_android.description: Advanced chip-level repairs, eMMC/CPU programming, board tracking, software issues and advanced troubleshooting techniques.

iphone.title: Complete iPhone Repair
iphone.description: Complete training on iPhone hardware, Face ID, True Tone, baseband issues, microsoldering, and advanced chip-level repairs.

enquiry_form.title: Start your mobile repair journey with us.
enquiry_form.description: Share your details and our team will guide you toward the best course for your goals.

popup.title: Prashant Mobile Solutions
popup.body: Explore expert mobile repair courses, get guidance, also book your first lesson with us.

about.hero_paragraph: Empowering the next generation of mobile repair professionals while delivering trusted repair services with quality, precision, and care.
our_story_paragraphs: Prashant Mobile Solutions is dedicated to providing reliable mobile repair services and industry-focused training.
With years of practical experience, we help customers restore their devices and equip aspiring technicians with the skills needed to build successful careers in mobile repairing.
about.mission_paragraph: To deliver dependable repair solutions and high-quality practical training that empowers individuals with real-world technical skills.
about.vision_paragraph: To become a trusted name in mobile repairing and technical education by creating skilled professionals and providing exceptional customer service.
about.journey_paragraph: Whether you're looking for expert mobile repair services or want to build a successful career in mobile repairing, Prashant Mobile Solutions is here to guide you every step of the way.

coming_soon.heading: Student Portal Coming Soon
coming_soon.intro: Our dedicated portal for Students and Users is on its way.
coming_soon.details: Soon you will be able to create an Account, Login securely, Access Course Material, Track your progress, And Enjoy many more features.

basic.label: Fundamentals of Mobile Repair
basic.title: Basic course
basic.paragraph: Unlock the essentials of mobile servicing with hands-on training for diagnostics, component replacement, and tool mastery.

advance.label: Advanced Repair Training
advance.title: Advanced course
advance.paragraph: Master board-level diagnostics, premium soldering techniques, and expert mobile repair workflows designed for serious technicians.

iphone.label: iPhone Specialist Track
iphone.title: Apple repair expertise
iphone.paragraph: Learn iPhone-specific diagnostics, screen replacements, battery servicing, and genuine component upgrades for premium devices.

bitmap.title: BITMAP
bitmap.description: A bitmap is a digital image such as a photo, wallpaper, or app icon represented by pixels. Every pixel stores color information e.g., red, green, and blue values.

dioda.title: DIODA
dioda.description: A diode is a semiconductor device that allows electric current to flow in one direction while blocking it in the opposite direction. It helps protect the phone's circuits and ensures components receive power correctly.

items.heading: BACK CAM SUPERWIDE
items.para: Diagnose and repair issues related to the Super Wide rear camera. Covers power supply, signal lines, and hardware troubleshooting.

items.heading: BACK CAM TELEPHOTO
items.para: Complete solution for Telephoto rear camera faults. Includes circuit analysis and component-level repair guidance.

items.heading: BACK CAM WIDE
items.para: Troubleshoot Wide rear camera problems such as no image, blur, or camera failure. Hardware checks with testing points included.

items.heading: BB CIRCUIT
items.para: Detailed Baseband circuit analysis for communication-related issues. Helps identify signal path and faulty components.

items.heading: CHARGER DATA
items.para: Covers charging and USB data transfer problems. Includes charging IC, connector, and data line troubleshooting.

items.heading: COMP NAME(swap board)
items.para: Lists component names and locations for board swapping. Makes identification easier during motherboard replacement.

items.heading: COMP NAME
items.para: Complete reference of motherboard component names and positions. Helps technicians quickly locate hardware components.

items.heading: FORCE DFU
items.para: Guide to forcing the device into DFU mode. Useful for software recovery and hardware diagnostics.

items.heading: FRONT CAM
items.para: Diagnose and repair front camera issues including black screen and camera not detected. Includes circuit and voltage checks.

items.heading: FRONT CAM IP
items.para: Solutions for Front IR camera faults affecting Face ID or IR sensing. Covers component testing and repair procedures.

items.heading: LCD
items.para: Complete LCD display troubleshooting guide. Resolves display, touch, backlight, and screen-related hardware issues.

items.heading: MIC SPK EAR
items.para: Diagnose microphone, speaker, and earpiece problems. Includes audio circuit testing and component replacement guidance.

items.heading: NETWORK
items.para: Hardware solutions for network and signal issues. Covers RF circuits, antennas, and connectivity troubleshooting.

items.heading: ON OFF
items.para: Repair guide for Power and Volume button faults. Includes switch circuits, flex cable, and voltage testing.

items.heading: SIM CARD
items.para: Troubleshoot SIM detection and network registration issues. Covers SIM slot, filters, and signal path analysis.

items.heading: TEST POINT RFFE
items.para: Reference for RF Front-End (RFFE) test points. Helps technicians measure voltages and diagnose RF hardware faults.

items.heading: TOUCH SCREEN
items.para: Diagnose touchscreen responsiveness and touch failure issues. Includes touch IC, connector, and circuit troubleshooting.

items.heading: WIFI BT GPS
items.para: Hardware repair guide for Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and GPS connectivity problems. Covers antenna circuits, ICs, and signal testing.
